title: U.S. Immigration - Green & Spiegel
content:
Home > U.S Immigration-2 > U.S. Immigration

## We are a long-established immigration law firm with an international reputation.
For decades, Green and Spiegel has stood at the forefront of immigration law, earning a trusted international reputation for excellence. At Green & Spiegel U.S., we focus exclusively on United States immigration law, bringing deep experience to both corporate and family-based matters.
We provide end-to-end immigration support, guiding clients through every step of a given process. From temporary nonimmigrant visas to permanent residency (green cards). Our team is committed to delivering clear, strategic advice and seamless execution, no matter the complexity of your case.
Our clients span a wide range of industries, including technology, education, athletics, manufacturing, research, and emerging startups. We also partner with businesses navigating government inquiries and compliance matters involving USCIS, the Department of Labor, and Immigration and Customs Enforcement.
No matter the scope, whether it’s an individual employment based visa, a complex litigation case, or a Department of Labor investigation, we approach every matter with the same level of precision, responsiveness, and care.
Whatever your immigration goals, Green & Spiegel U.S. is ready to help you move forward with confidence.
